name: Gusto
tagline: Payroll, benefits, and HR for small businesses
description: Gusto is the go-to payroll and HR platform for small US-based businesses. It handles payroll taxes automatically, offers health benefits, 401(k) management, and onboarding — all with a friendly, non-intimidating interface.
use_cases: You're a US-based small business owner who wants payroll taxes filed automatically across all states without hiring a payroll specialist
You're hiring your first employees and want onboarding, offer letters, and benefits enrollment in a single platform with no paper forms
Your team wants to offer health insurance and 401(k) through one provider rather than managing separate benefit brokers
You need a payroll tool your employees will actually use via self-service — pay stubs, W-2s, PTO requests — without contacting HR
